nasb.text: For there is a proper time and procedure for every delight, though a man’s trouble is heavy upon him.

esv.text: For there is a time and a way for everything, although man’s trouble lies heavy on him.

cnv.text: 各樣事務成就，都有合宜的時機和定局，儘管人的災禍重壓在自己身上。

ccb.text: 尽管人面临重重困难，但做任何事都有时机和方法。

csbs.text: 一切事务都有时机和次序，尽管有祸患重压在人身上。
